content: Hey, I'm Rowan, a truck driver from Texas. I've been driving for years, but I've recently taken up speedcubing as a hobby.
That's really cool! Speedcubing is such a unique and challenging hobby. What got you into it?

I saw a video of someone solving a Rubik's Cube in like 10 seconds, and I was amazed. I decided to give it a try, and now I'm hooked. I even started a garden in my backyard to help me relax when I'm not driving.
Gardening is a great way to unwind. Do you have any favorite plants or flowers that you like to grow?
I love growing all kinds of plants, but I'm especially fond of Japanese maples. I also have a beehive in my backyard, and I've been learning about beekeeping.
That's fascinating. Beekeeping can be so rewarding. Have you harvested any honey yet?

Not yet, but I'm hoping to soon. I've been taking a beekeeping course to learn more about it. And I've also been training for a triathlon next month, which has been a challenge but also really rewarding.
Wow, a triathlon is a big undertaking. What made you decide to sign up for one?
I wanted to push myself and see what I'm capable of. I've been driving a truck for so long, and I needed a new challenge. Plus, my friend, Mike, is doing it with me, so we can motivate each other.
Having a buddy to train with can make all the difference. What's your favorite part of the triathlon training so far?

I think my favorite part is the swimming. I've always loved swimming, and it's great exercise. I'm not as fond of the running, but I'm working on it. I'm hoping to finish the triathlon in under 2 hours, which would be a huge accomplishment for me.
